summary: Threaded context.Context through the generated HTTP client so Ctrl+C and command-level timeouts cancel in-flight requests.
reason: Generated client built requests via http.NewRequest with context.Background(), so multi-hop commands (megatrend-map, sync) could hold the terminal hostage for the full HTTPClient.Timeout after SIGINT. Greptile P1 on PR #548.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test pass for the full module.
upstream_issue: Generator template internal/generator/templates/client.go.tmpl emits http.NewRequest without ctx for every printed CLI; upstream fix would replace this single-CLI patch across the catalog.
